gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor motions toward the screen with both hands spread wide, inviting attention to the colorful objects displayed
a person leans slightly forward, tilting their head, and smiles while encouraging guesses about the total number of objects
a tutor steps closer to the groups, extends a hand outward, and demonstrates the motion of combining with smooth, sweeping gestures
a person stands upright, counts aloud with open palms facing the objects, making inviting gestures to include the viewers in the counting
a tutor enthusiastically raises both arms and gestures toward the new group of objects, encouraging learners to count actively
a person shifts weight slightly, tilts their head, and extends a hand out as if prompting learners to share the total after combining
a tutor claps hands together joyfully, steps back a little, and beams with pride in celebrating the learners' achievement in adding
a person holds both hands palm-up, gestures in a moving arc to emphasize bringing groups together, and smiles warmly
